a2a:agent-card.a2a:json: { "protocolVersion": "0.3.0", "name": "atelier-procurement-agent", "description": "調達担当 AI エージェント (Atelier 用 同期 A2A 版)。代替部品検索 / 発注ドラフト / サプライヤー通知を LLM tool-use ループで実施し、統合サマリを返す。在庫照会・仮確保は logistics-agent、 サプライヤーリスクスコア更新・KG 記録は legal-agent 経路 (いずれも対象外)。", "url": "${agent.public.url}", "version": "1.0.0", "preferredTransport": "JSONRPC", "capabilities": { "streaming": false, "pushNotifications": false, "stateTransitionHistory": false }, "defaultInputModes": ["text/plain", "application/json"], "defaultOutputModes": ["text/plain", "application/json"], "skills": [ { "id": "procurement_handle_incident", "name": "調達インシデント対応 (LLM tool-use)", "description": "サプライヤー品質インシデント連絡を自然文で受け取り、代替部品検索 / 発注ドラフト / 通知 を tool-use ループで実施し、Slack 投稿フォーマットの統合サマリを返す。在庫照会・仮確保は logistics-agent の担当 (対象外)。", "examples": [ "関西部品 G-KANSAI-PARTS-001 の P-2024-KAN-001 で不良率15% (500個 HIGH)。INC-2026-0521。代替部品で調達対応してほしい。" ], "inputModes": ["text/plain", "application/json"], "outputModes": ["text/plain", "application/json"], "tags": ["procurement", "inventory", "purchase-order"] } ] }

logger.message: #['atelier-procurement-agent A2A task received. method=' ++ (attributes.jsonRpcMethod default '?') ++ ' taskId=' ++ (attributes.taskId default '?')]

ee:transform.doc:name: extract user text + task ids + contextId

ee:variables.ee:set-variable: %dw 2.0 output application/java --- ((attributes.taskId default (now() as String)) as String)
%dw 2.0 output application/java --- if (payload is String) read(payload, "application/json") else payload

%dw 2.0 output application/java var p = if (payload is String) read(payload, "application/json") else payload var fromAttr = (attributes.contextId default "") as String var fromMsg = (p.message.contextId default "") as String --- if (fromAttr != "") fromAttr else fromMsg

%dw 2.0 output application/java var p = if (payload is String) read(payload, "application/json") else payload var dataParts = ((p.message.parts default []) filter ((x) -> (x.kind default x."type" default "") == "data")) --- if (sizeOf(dataParts) > 0) (dataParts[0].data default null) else null

logger.message: #['procurement-agent: directPart=' ++ (if (vars.directPart != null) 'yes' else 'no') ++ ' userText=' ++ ((vars.userText default '') as String)]

choice.doc:name: broker direct (data part) か 人間 自然文か

logger.message: #['proc intent pipeline failed: ' ++ (error.description default error.message default 'unknown')]

ee:variables.ee:set-variable: %dw 2.0 output application/java --- "⚠️ atelier-procurement-agent: 処理中にエラーが発生しました。\n" ++ " " ++ ((error.description default (error.message default "unknown")) as String)
%dw 2.0 output application/java --- 0
%dw 2.0 output application/java --- ""
%dw 2.0 output application/java --- ""
%dw 2.0 output application/java --- []

%dw 2.0 output application/java var sysPrompt = "あなたは調達担当 AI (atelier-procurement-agent)。専門領域は procurement (代替部品・発注ドラフト・サプライヤー通知) のみ。
" ++ "
" ++ "=== STEP 0: メタ質問 (scope / capability) は STEP 1 を飛ばして自然文で答える ===
" ++ "
" ++ "ユーザが「何ができる?」「インシデント登録もできる?」「君の役割は?」のようなツール実行を伴わない質問をしてきたら、 NEED_INFO ゲートを発動せず、 1〜3 行の自然文で簡潔に答える。
" ++ " - できる: 代替部品候補の取得 / 発注ドラフトの作成 / サプライヤーへの通知。
" ++ " - できない (担当外): インシデント起票 (incident-agent) / 法務 (legal-agent) / 在庫照会・仮確保 (logistics-agent) / 承認依頼 (org-agent) / supplier の正規化 ID 解決 (broker または MDM)。
" ++ " → 担当外の依頼は、 担当する agent に直接話すか broker に投げてもらうよう案内する。
" ++ "
" ++ "具体的に調達関連のツール実行を頼まれたときだけ、 STEP 1 のゲートに進む。
" ++ "
" ++ "=== STEP 1: 最優先 — NEED_INFO ゲート (ツール実行依頼に対してのみ発動。 違反する出力は重大エラー) ===
" ++ "
" ++ "次のいずれかが揃っていなければ、 何があっても tool を呼ばず、 ADVISORY/EXECUTE テンプレも一切書かず、 [NEED_INFO] block だけを返す:
" ++ " - partNumber (正規化済の P-YYYY-... 形式)。 「ハンドル部品」「あの部品」のような曖昧表現は不可。
" ++ " - create_purchase_order_draft 時のみ追加で必要: supplierGoldenId (G-XXX 形式)、 quantity (整数)、 unitPrice (数値、 任意)。 サプライヤー名から goldenId を推測してはいけない。
" ++ " - notify_supplier 時のみ追加で必要: supplierGoldenId と message 本文 (incidentId が望ましい)。
" ++ "
" ++ " **絶対禁止例 (これらは重大エラー)**:
" ++ " - サプライヤー名「関西部品」を見て supplierGoldenId="G-KANSAI-PARTS-001" を勝手に作る → ❌
" ++ " - 部品名「ハンドル部品」を見て partNumber="P-HANDLE-001" を勝手に作る → ❌
" ++ " - サプライヤー名 → goldenId のマッピングを推測する → ❌
" ++ " - 不足を埋めずに ADVISORY テーブルに値を埋めて返す → ❌
" ++ "
" ++ "NEED_INFO 出力フォーマット (これだけを返す。 他のテキスト/テーブル/絵文字は書かない):
" ++ "
" ++ " [NEED_INFO]
" ++ " - <question 1 — ユーザの最後のメッセージと同じ言語で書く。 日本語で来たら日本語で問い返す。 normalized ID or value を要求すること>
" ++ " - <question 2 ...>
" ++ " [/NEED_INFO]
" ++ "
" ++ "自分のドメイン外 (supplier ID 解決、 在庫数量、 仮確保、 法務契約、 承認、 インシデント採番) も同じ方式で [NEED_INFO] を返す。 在庫関連は logistics-agent が hub。
" ++ "上位 (broker または人間) が解決して回答したら、 その値を使って自分の tool を実行する。
" ++ "
" ++ "=== STEP 2: 全項目揃った場合のみ — 通常の処理 ===
" ++ "
" ++ "利用可能 tool: get_alternative_parts / create_purchase_order_draft / notify_supplier のみ。
" ++ "
" ++ "動作モード: ADVISORY
" ++ " - 基本は「代替候補や状況を提示し、 推奨アクションを箇条書き」。
" ++ " - 副作用 tool (create_purchase_order_draft / notify_supplier) は **ユーザが明示的に指示したときだけ** 実行。
" ++ "
" ++ "tool の引数は user メッセージの固有名詞をそのまま使う。「unknown supplier」「GENERIC-001」「placeholder」は絶対不可。
" ++ "
" ++ "tool 戻り値:
" ++ " - get_alternative_parts → result.alternatives[i].partNumber / .compatibility / .supplierGoldenId / .supplierName
" ++ " - create_purchase_order_draft → result.draftId / result.totalAmount
" ++ " - notify_supplier → result.notificationId
" ++ "
" ++ "出力フォーマット:
" ++ " [ADVISORY] ✅ procurement-agent: <一言サマリ> / 代替候補 <partNumber> 互換<%> 供給元 <supplierName> / 推奨: <理由>
" ++ " [EXECUTE] ✅ procurement-agent: <実行サマリ> / 代替部品 <partNumber> / PO ドラフト <draftId> ¥<totalAmount> / 通知 <notificationId>" --- if ((vars.priorMessages default []) != []) (vars.priorMessages default []) ++ [{ role: "user", content: (vars.userText default "") as String }] else [ { role: "system", content: sysPrompt }, { role: "user", content: (vars.userText default "") as String } ]
%dw 2.0 output application/java --- 1 to (p('agent.max_loops') as Number)
%dw 2.0 output application/java --- ((payload default 0) - 1) as Number

logger.message: #['Agent loop done. iterations=' ++ (vars.loopCount as String) ++ ' finishReason=' ++ (vars.finishReason default '')]

ee:variables.ee:set-variable: %dw 2.0 output application/json --- { model: (p('llm.model') default "gpt-5-mini") as String, max_completion_tokens: (p('llm.max_tokens') default 2048) as Number, messages: vars.messages default [], tools: vars.tools default [], tool_choice: "auto" }
%dw 2.0 output application/java --- (((payload default {}).choices default [])[0].message) default { role: "assistant", content: "" }
%dw 2.0 output application/java --- ((((payload default {}).choices default [])[0].finish_reason) default "") as String
%dw 2.0 output application/java --- (vars.messages default []) ++ [(((payload default {}).choices default [])[0].message) default { role: "assistant", content: "" }]
%dw 2.0 output application/java --- ((vars.assistantMsg.content default "") as String)

logger.message: #['Loop iter=' ++ (vars.loopCount as String) ++ ' finishReason=' ++ (vars.finishReason default '') ++ ' tool_calls=' ++ ((sizeOf(vars.assistantMsg.tool_calls default []) as String))]

ee:variables.ee:set-variable: %dw 2.0 output application/java --- ((payload."id" default "") as String)
%dw 2.0 output application/java --- ((payload.function.name default "") as String)
%dw 2.0 output application/java --- ((payload.function.arguments default "{}") as String)
%dw 2.0 output application/java --- read((vars.toolArgsRaw default "{}") as String, "application/json")

%dw 2.0 output application/java var n = (vars.toolName default "") as String --- if (n == "get_alternative_parts" or n == "create_purchase_order_draft" or n == "notify_supplier") "procurement" else "unknown"

%dw 2.0 output application/java --- (vars.messages default []) ++ [{ role: "tool", tool_call_id: (vars.toolCallId default "") as String, content: write((vars.toolResult default {}), "application/json") as String }]
%dw 2.0 output application/java --- (vars.actionsLog default []) ++ [{ tool: (vars.toolName default "") as String, result: (vars.toolResult default {}) }]

choice.doc:name: 埋め込みJSON か 自然文か

ee:variables.ee:set-variable:
%dw 2.0 output application/java var sys = "あなたは調達・在庫 agent の『意図抽出器』です。 ユーザの 1 メッセージを読み、 下記 JSON だけを出力。 説明やコードフェンスは書かない。
" ++ "
" ++ "scope: "procurement" (代替部品検索・発注ドラフト・仕入先通知 のみ) | "capability" (メタ質問) | "out_of_scope" (調達以外)
" ++ "【重要】在庫照会・在庫の仮確保・予約は調達ではなく logistics の担当なので、 必ず out_of_scope。
" ++ " 「仮確保」「在庫はある?」「在庫を押さえて」「ついでに〜在庫を確保」等は、 代替部品の話が前に出ていても out_of_scope。
" ++ "mode : "advise" (代替部品を調べて提案するだけ) | "execute" (発注ドラフト作成まで明示依頼: 「ドラフト作って」「発注して」「PO作成」)
" ++ "
" ++ "entities は読めた値だけ。 読めないものは null。 推測・捏造禁止。 社名は GoldenId に変換せず supplierName にそのまま。
" ++ " supplierName / supplierGoldenId (G-XXX) / partNumber (P-...) / incidentId (INC-...) / quantity (整数)
" ++ "
" ++ "出力: {"scope":"...","mode":"advise","entities":{"supplierName":null,"supplierGoldenId":null,"partNumber":null,"incidentId":null,"quantity":null},"rawMessage":"原文"}" --- [ { role: "system", content: sys }, { role: "user", content: "九州製作所 P-2024-KYU-001 の代替部品で 120 台分の発注ドラフトを作って" }, { role: "assistant", content: write({ scope: "procurement", mode: "execute", entities: { supplierName: "九州製作所", supplierGoldenId: null, partNumber: "P-2024-KYU-001", incidentId: null, quantity: 120 }, rawMessage: "" }, "application/json") }, { role: "user", content: "P-2024-KYU-001 の代替部品ある?" }, { role: "assistant", content: write({ scope: "procurement", mode: "advise", entities: { supplierName: null, supplierGoldenId: null, partNumber: "P-2024-KYU-001", incidentId: null, quantity: null }, rawMessage: "" }, "application/json") }, { role: "user", content: "君は何ができる?" }, { role: "assistant", content: write({ scope: "capability", mode: "advise", entities: { supplierName: null, supplierGoldenId: null, partNumber: null, incidentId: null, quantity: null }, rawMessage: "" }, "application/json") }, { role: "user", content: "返品要求書を発行して" }, { role: "assistant", content: write({ scope: "out_of_scope", mode: "advise", entities: { supplierName: null, supplierGoldenId: null, partNumber: null, incidentId: null, quantity: null }, rawMessage: "" }, "application/json") }, { role: "user", content: "P-2024-KYU-001 の在庫はある? 120台必要" }, { role: "assistant", content: write({ scope: "out_of_scope", mode: "advise", entities: { supplierName: null, supplierGoldenId: null, partNumber: null, incidentId: null, quantity: null }, rawMessage: "" }, "application/json") }, { role: "user", content: "代替部品を120台仮確保して" }, { role: "assistant", content: write({ scope: "out_of_scope", mode: "advise", entities: { supplierName: null, supplierGoldenId: null, partNumber: null, incidentId: null, quantity: null }, rawMessage: "" }, "application/json") }, { role: "user", content: "ついでにその代替部品の在庫を 120 台ぶん仮確保しておいて。" }, { role: "assistant", content: write({ scope: "out_of_scope", mode: "advise", entities: { supplierName: null, supplierGoldenId: null, partNumber: null, incidentId: null, quantity: null }, rawMessage: "" }, "application/json") }, { role: "user", content: "担当バイヤーに承認依頼を出して" }, { role: "assistant", content: write({ scope: "out_of_scope", mode: "advise", entities: { supplierName: null, supplierGoldenId: null, partNumber: null, incidentId: null, quantity: null }, rawMessage: "" }, "application/json") }, { role: "user", content: (vars.userText default "") as String } ]

%dw 2.0 output application/json --- { model: (p('llm.model') default "gpt-5-mini") as String, max_completion_tokens: (p('llm.max_tokens') default 2048) as Number, messages: (vars.extractMessages default []) }

logger.message: #['proc-agent scope=' ++ (vars.intent.scope default '?') ++ ' mode=' ++ (vars.intent.mode default '?') ++ ' entities=' ++ write(vars.intent.entities default {}, 'application/json')]

ee:variables.ee:set-variable:
%dw 2.0 output application/java --- "📦 調達・在庫 (atelier-procurement-agent) です。

**できること**
- 代替部品の検索 (互換率つき)
- 発注ドラフトの作成
- 仕入先への通知

**担当外**: インシデント (incident) / 法務 (legal) / 在庫仮確保 (logistics) / 承認 (org)。"
%dw 2.0 output application/java --- "その依頼は調達 agent の担当外です。\nインシデントは incident、 法務は legal、 在庫仮確保は logistics、 承認は org、 もしくは broker へ。"
%dw 2.0 output application/java --- "[NEED_INFO]\n- 対象の部品番号 (P-YYYY-... 形式) を教えてください。\n[/NEED_INFO]"
#['get_alternative_parts']
#['procurement']
%dw 2.0 output application/java --- { partNumber: (vars.intent.entities.partNumber default "") as String }
%dw 2.0 output application/java --- ((vars.toolResult.result default {}).alternatives default [])
%dw 2.0 output application/java var a = ((vars.toolResult.result default {}).alternatives default []) --- if (sizeOf(a) > 0) a[0] else null

choice.doc:name: mode=execute なら 発注ドラフト

when.expression: #[(vars.intent.mode default "advise") == "execute" and (vars.bestAlt default null) != null and (vars.intent.entities.quantity default null) != null]

ee:variables.ee:set-variable: #['create_purchase_order_draft']
#['procurement']

%dw 2.0 output application/java var alt = vars.bestAlt --- { partNumber: (alt.partNumber default "") as String, quantity: vars.intent.entities.quantity, supplierGoldenId: (alt.supplierGoldenId default "") as String } ++ (if ((vars.intent.entities.incidentId default null) != null) { incidentId: vars.intent.entities.incidentId } else {})
%dw 2.0 output application/java --- (vars.toolResult.result default vars.toolResult default {})

when.expression: #[(vars.poDraft.draftId default null) != null and (vars.bestAlt.supplierGoldenId default null) != null]

ee:variables.ee:set-variable: #['notify_supplier']
#['procurement']
%dw 2.0 output application/java --- { ok: ((vars.toolResult.status default "ok") as String) != "error", result: (vars.toolResult.result default {}) }
%dw 2.0 output application/java --- null

%dw 2.0 output application/java var d = (vars.poDraft default {}) var alt = vars.bestAlt default {} var nt = vars.notifyResult default null fun cell(v) = if (v == null or (v as String) == "") "—" else (v as String) --- "📦 調達エージェント (実行完了)

" ++ "| 項目 | 値 |
|---|---|
" ++ "| 代替部品 | **" ++ cell(alt.partNumber) ++ "** (互換 " ++ cell((alt.compatibility default 0) * 100) ++ "%) |
" ++ "| 供給元 | " ++ cell(alt.supplierName default alt.supplierGoldenId) ++ " |
" ++ "| 数量 | " ++ cell(vars.intent.entities.quantity) ++ " |
" ++ "| 発注ドラフト | **" ++ cell(d.draftId) ++ "** |
" ++ "| 概算額 | ¥" ++ cell(d.totalAmount) ++ " |" ++ (if (nt != null and nt.ok == true) ("
| 仕入先通知 | **送信済** (ORDER) |") else "")

%dw 2.0 output application/java var a = vars.alts default [] fun cell(v) = if (v == null or (v as String) == "") "—" else (v as String) --- if (sizeOf(a) == 0) ("📦 調達エージェント: " ++ (vars.intent.entities.partNumber default "") ++ " の代替部品は見つかりませんでした。") else ("📦 調達エージェント (相談)

代替部品候補:

" ++ "| 部品 | 互換 | 供給元 | リードタイム |
|---|---|---|---|
" ++ (a map ((x) -> "| **" ++ cell(x.partNumber) ++ "** | " ++ cell((x.compatibility default 0) * 100) ++ "% | " ++ cell(x.supplierName default x.supplierGoldenId) ++ " | " ++ cell(x.leadTimeHours) ++ "h |") joinBy "
") ++ "

数量を添えて「発注ドラフト作って」で PO を作成します。")
%dw 2.0 output application/java --- ((vars.directPart.tool default vars.directPart.toolName default "") as String)
%dw 2.0 output application/java --- (vars.directPart.args default vars.directPart."input" default {})

%dw 2.0 output application/java var n = (vars.directPart.tool default vars.directPart.toolName default "") as String --- if (n == "get_alternative_parts" or n == "create_purchase_order_draft" or n == "notify_supplier") "procurement" else "unknown"

logger.message: #['procurement-agent direct fast-path: tool=' ++ (vars.toolName default '') ++ ' args=' ++ write(vars.toolArgs default {}, 'application/json')]

ee:variables.ee:set-variable: %dw 2.0 output application/java --- write({ status: "error", agent: "atelier-procurement-agent", mode: "direct", result: { code: "UNKNOWN_TOOL", message: "unsupported tool for direct mode: " ++ (vars.toolName default ""), supported: ["get_alternative_parts","create_purchase_order_draft","notify_supplier"] } }, "application/json") as String

ee:transform.doc:name: wrap direct result as JSON reply

ee:variables.ee:set-variable: %dw 2.0 output application/java --- write({ status: "ok", agent: "atelier-procurement-agent", mode: "direct", tool: (vars.toolName default "") as String, result: (vars.toolResult default {}) }, "application/json") as String

ee:message.ee:set-payload: %dw 2.0 output application/json --- { toolName: (vars.toolName default "") as String, "input": (vars.toolArgs default {}) }
%dw 2.0 output application/json --- { status: "error", tool: (vars.toolName default "") as String, result: { code: "UNKNOWN_TOOL", message: "no MCP for tool: " ++ (vars.toolName default "") } }

%dw 2.0 output application/json --- { status: "error", tool: (vars.toolName default "") as String, result: { code: "MCP_CALL_FAILED", message: (error.description default error.message default "unknown") as String } }

logger.message: #['MCP call failed kind=' ++ (vars.mcpKind default '') ++ ' tool=' ++ (vars.toolName default '') ++ ' err=' ++ (error.description default error.message default 'unknown')]

ee:variables.ee:set-variable: %dw 2.0 output application/java --- []

%dw 2.0 output application/java fun parseList(s) = if (s == null or s == "") [] else read(s, "application/json") --- if (vars.priorRaw == null) [] else if (vars.priorRaw is String) parseList(vars.priorRaw as String) else (vars.priorRaw default [])
%dw 2.0 output application/java --- []

logger.message: #['memory load: contextId=' ++ (vars.contextId default '') ++ ' priorMessages=' ++ (sizeOf(vars.priorMessages default []) as String)]

ee:message.ee:set-payload: %dw 2.0 output application/java --- write((vars.messages default []), "application/json") as String

logger.message: #['memory save: contextId=' ++ (vars.contextId default '') ++ ' messages=' ++ (sizeOf(vars.messages default []) as String)]
